title: A Rooftop Clash Against Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Kid, Unknown person #8, Killer as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So you can counter my durability?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you're not the suicidal fools I took you for!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been through hell because of this tough hide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But looks like I can get through, if I slice you up from inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: These brats are tougher than expected...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You ingrates are testing my patience!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 19 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
